faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Nasta.
faq.stillHaveQuestionsDesc: We are here to help. Submit a support ticket anytime.
faq.a1: Nasta is an on-demand marketplace that connects verified service providers with trusted clients for instant work. Think of it like a ride-sharing app, but for jobs. Clients can request help right now, and service providers can pick up jobs instantly as their main work or a side gig.
faq.a2: When a client books a job, payment is secured upfront via Stripe and held in escrow. Once the job is marked complete by both parties, funds are released to the service provider automatically.
faq.a3: Yes. Every user on Nasta goes through identity verification with government-issued documents before they can accept or post jobs. This protects both clients and service providers.
faq.q4: What types of jobs can I find on Nasta?
faq.a4: Nasta supports unlimited job categories including cleaning, childcare, elderly care, construction, event staffing, moving, gardening, tutoring, and much more. If you can do it, you can list it.
faq.a5: Clients only pay when the job is complete. Every worker is ID-verified, assignments include live GPS tracking and digital check-in/out, and there is a fair cancellation and no-show protection policy.
faq.q6: How does Nasta protect service providers?
faq.a6: Payment is secured before work begins, so you are guaranteed to get paid for completed work. All clients are also verified, and you can rate and review every assignment.
faq.a7: Creating an account is free for both clients and service providers. Nasta takes a small platform commission from each completed job to cover payment processing and platform operations.
faq.a8: Yes. Nasta has full-featured iOS and Android apps. You can apply for jobs, manage bookings, chat, and receive payments all from your phone.
faq.a9: Simply create a free account, verify your identity, set up your profile, and start browsing. The whole process takes less than five minutes.
faq.q10: Can I use Nasta as a side job?
faq.a10: Absolutely. Many service providers use Nasta to pick up extra work on their own schedule. You choose when you are available and which jobs to accept. There are no minimum hours or commitments.
faq.q11: How fast can I find a worker?
faq.a11: Clients can use instant requests to find available, verified service providers nearby in seconds. For scheduled jobs, you will typically receive applications from qualified candidates shortly after posting.

support.abuseReportText:
Hello {{userName}},

Thank you for taking the time to report this issue. We take all abuse reports very seriously and are committed to maintaining a safe and respectful environment for all our users.

Your report has been received and assigned the following details:

Ticket Number: {{ticketNumber}}
Subject: {{subject}}
Priority: {{priority}}

Our team will investigate this matter promptly and thoroughly. We understand the importance of addressing these concerns quickly, and we want you to know that your safety and well-being are our top priorities.

We will review your report carefully and take appropriate action. You can expect to hear back from us within 24-48 hours regarding the status of your report.

If this is an emergency or you feel unsafe, please contact local authorities immediately.

Thank you for helping us maintain a safe community.

Best regards,
Nasta Safety Team

support.securityReportThankYou: Thank you for reporting this security concern. We take security issues extremely seriously and appreciate your vigilance in helping us protect our platform and our users.
support.securityReportText:
Hello {{userName}},

Thank you for reporting this security concern. We take security issues extremely seriously and appreciate your vigilance in helping us protect our platform and our users.

Your security report has been received and assigned the following details:

Ticket Number: {{ticketNumber}}
Subject: {{subject}}
Priority: {{priority}}

Our security team has been immediately notified and will investigate this matter with the highest priority. We understand that security concerns require urgent attention, and we are committed to addressing this promptly.

We will conduct a thorough investigation and take all necessary measures to ensure the safety and security of our platform. You can expect to receive an update from our security team within 24-48 hours.

If you believe your account or personal information may be at risk, we recommend:
- Changing your password immediately
- Enabling two-factor authentication if available
- Monitoring your account for any suspicious activity

Thank you for your cooperation and for helping us maintain a secure environment.

Best regards,
Nasta Security Team

support.surveyThankYouSubheader: Your feedback means the world to us
support.surveyThankYouMessage: Thank you so much for taking the time to share your valuable feedback with us! Your insights as a {{roleName}} are incredibly important to us and help us make Nasta a better platform for everyone.
support.surveyThankYouText:
Hello {{userName}},

Thank you so much for taking the time to share your valuable feedback with us! Your insights as a {{roleName}} are incredibly important to us and help us make Nasta a better platform for everyone.

We truly appreciate your thoughtful responses and the time you dedicated to completing our survey. Your feedback will be carefully reviewed by our team, and we'll use it to:

• Improve our services and features
• Enhance your experience on the platform
• Address any areas that need attention
• Continue building a platform that serves you better

Your voice matters, and we're grateful that you chose to share it with us. We're committed to listening to your feedback and making meaningful improvements based on what you've told us.

If you have any additional thoughts or suggestions in the future, please don't hesitate to reach out. We're always here to listen.

Thank you again for being such an important part of the Nasta community!

Warm regards,
The Nasta Team

aboutPage.title: About Nasta
aboutPage.intro: Nasta is an on-demand workforce marketplace that connects verified service providers with trusted clients instantly. Whether you need someone right now for an urgent task or want to schedule a long-term contract, Nasta makes hiring fast, fair, and fully transparent.
aboutPage.missionDesc: We believe that everyone deserves instant access to legitimate work opportunities, and every client deserves instant access to reliable, verified talent. Nasta was built to make that connection instant and seamless, while protecting both sides with secure payments, identity verification, and real-time job monitoring.
aboutPage.forSPDesc: Create a verified profile and receive instant job requests near you. Use Nasta as your main income or a flexible side gig, and get paid securely when the work is done.
aboutPage.forEmpDesc: Post instant requests for on-demand help or schedule jobs across unlimited categories. Browse verified candidates, book with confidence, and only release payment when you're satisfied.
aboutPage.trustDesc: Every user on Nasta is identity-verified with government-issued documents. Payments are held in escrow via Stripe until the job is complete. Live GPS tracking and digital check-in/out ensure full accountability for every assignment.

forEmployersPage.heroDesc: Need something done right now? Request instantly available, verified service providers on demand. Every worker is ID-verified, every assignment is monitored in real-time, and every payment is protected by Stripe escrow.
forEmployersPage.benefit0Desc: Every service provider undergoes government ID verification before they can accept any assignment. You always know exactly who is showing up.
forEmployersPage.benefit1Desc: Your money is held safely by Stripe until the job is marked complete. You only release payment when you are satisfied with the work.
forEmployersPage.benefit2Desc: Live GPS tracking and digital check-in/out for every assignment. Full visibility from start to finish, so there are never any surprises.
forEmployersPage.benefit3Desc: Need help right now? Post an instant request and get matched with verified, available service providers near you. Or schedule ahead for planned work.
forEmployersPage.benefit4Desc: See every service provider's track record before you book. Verified reviews from real clients help you make confident decisions.
forEmployersPage.benefit5Desc: From cleaning and childcare to construction and events. Post any type of job across unlimited service categories.
forEmployersPage.step0Desc: Need help right now? Use instant request to find available providers nearby. Or post a scheduled job for later. Takes less than two minutes.
forEmployersPage.step1Desc: Instantly available service providers are matched to your request. Every one is ID-verified with ratings, reviews, and verified experience.
forEmployersPage.step2Desc: Book with confidence. Track the assignment in real-time. Release payment only when the work meets your standards.
forEmployersPage.reqTitle: What you need to get started
forEmployersPage.reqDesc: A quick setup so you can start hiring fast. Add the essentials and request your first service provider today.
forEmployersPage.req0Desc: Your business or residential address for job location accuracy
forEmployersPage.req1Desc: For direct communication and account security
forEmployersPage.req2Desc: SMS and email confirmation to verify your account
forEmployersPage.req3Desc: Add a card to book service providers and secure payment in escrow
forEmployersPage.protectedP1: When you book a service provider, payment is secured in Stripe escrow before work begins. The service provider can see the payment is secured, but cannot access the funds.
forEmployersPage.protectedP2: Once the job is complete and you confirm satisfaction, the funds are released. If there is a dispute, our team reviews the case with full GPS logs, check-in/out records, and communication history.
forEmployersPage.protectedP3: Nasta takes a small platform commission to cover payment processing, identity verification, and monitoring infrastructure. You never pay more than the agreed job price.
forEmployersPage.ctaDesc: Create a free client account and post your first job in minutes.

forServiceProvidersPage.heroDesc: Whether it is your main income or a side gig, Nasta connects you with instant job requests from verified clients. Get paid fast, work on your schedule, and build your reputation.
forServiceProvidersPage.benefit0Desc: Once both sides confirm the job is done, funds are released to your account automatically via Stripe. Fast, transparent, and fully traceable, every payment is recorded and compliant.
forServiceProvidersPage.benefit1Desc: Every job is backed by Stripe escrow. The client's payment is secured before you start, so you are guaranteed to be paid for completed work.
forServiceProvidersPage.benefit2Desc: Every client on Nasta is verified too. You always know who you are working for, with transparent job details and fair terms.
forServiceProvidersPage.benefit3Desc: Cleaning, childcare, construction, events, tutoring, and more. Pick up instant jobs in any category, whether as your main work or a side gig.
forServiceProvidersPage.benefit4Desc: Get instant job notifications, apply with one tap, chat with clients, and track your earnings. Full-featured iOS and Android app.
forServiceProvidersPage.benefit5Desc: Every completed job earns you ratings and reviews. A strong profile means more bookings, better jobs, and higher earnings over time.
forServiceProvidersPage.step0Desc: Sign up for free, verify your identity with a government ID, and set up your skills and availability. Takes less than five minutes.
forServiceProvidersPage.step1Desc: Receive real-time notifications for jobs near you that match your skills. Accept with one tap, or browse and apply on your schedule.
forServiceProvidersPage.step2Desc: Complete the assignment, check out digitally, and funds are released to your payout account. Simple, fast, transparent.
forServiceProvidersPage.verifyDesc: Complete your verification to unlock instant job requests and start earning. Every step builds your trust score and visibility.
forServiceProvidersPage.req0Desc: Government-issued photo ID to confirm your real identity
forServiceProvidersPage.req1Desc: Required for driving jobs, must be issued at least 3 years ago
forServiceProvidersPage.req2Desc: Comprehensive screening for your safety and client trust
forServiceProvidersPage.req3Desc: Your work experience and qualifications on file
forServiceProvidersPage.req4Desc: List your professional skills with your service rates in EUR
forServiceProvidersPage.req5Desc: Date of birth, address, verified phone and email required for payouts
forServiceProvidersPage.req6Desc: SMS and email confirmation to secure your account
forServiceProvidersPage.protectedP1: Before you start any job, the client's payment is already secured in Stripe escrow. Whether this is your full-time work or a side gig, you will never do work without the guarantee of getting paid.
forServiceProvidersPage.protectedP2: Once the job is complete and confirmed, your earnings are released directly to your connected payout account. Most payouts arrive within 1-2 business days.
forServiceProvidersPage.protectedP3: Nasta takes a small platform commission from each completed job to cover payment processing and platform operations. You always see the exact amount you will earn before accepting a job.
forServiceProvidersPage.ctaDesc: Create a free account, verify your identity, and start applying for jobs today.
